name: Sunny (Omori)
description:
"random hangout after 4 years?"

This bot is still a major work in progress, if there are any suggestions at all please lmk, this is my 2nd bot ever and I will take any criticism.

If you want a more accurate sunny then you should add a "mute character" prompt in the advanced prompt settings, and you should mention that Sunny is very quiet and/or mute in the introduction reply that you make.
